zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Gooch於1439年5月17日出生在英國威爾斯時，他的父親Sir Knight Mathew Goch53歲，母親Margred Rhys Moethe Verch22歲。他於1480年與Lady Elizabeth Treherne在英國素福爾可梅廷加姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年11月28日在英國格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Gooch于1439年5月17日出生在英国威尔斯时，他的父亲Sir Knight Mathew Goch53岁，母亲Margred Rhys Moethe Verch22岁。他于1480年与Lady Elizabeth Treherne在英国素福爾可梅廷加姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年11月28日在英国格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gooch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gough
meanings: Welsh: from coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’. The mutated form goch is normal after a personal name. In England, where the surname occurs from Welsh migration, it may have become hereditary in medieval times but this development was probably much later in Wales. Compare Gooch and Couch , which may sometimes derive from the same source.
Irish (especially Waterford and Dublin): shortened form of   McGough  .

variants.name: Gouge
meanings: English: variant of   Gooch   or   Couch  .

variants.name: Googe
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Gooch  .

variants.name: Couch
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Gooch was born on 17 May 1439, in Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight Mathew Goch, was 53 and his mother, Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, was 22. He married Lady Elizabeth Treherne in 1480, in Mettingham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 November 1512, in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Gooch est né le 17 mai 1439, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Mathew Goch, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Treherne en 1480, à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1512, à Newland, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Gooch am 17. Mai 1439 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Knight Mathew Goch 53 und seine Mutter Margred Rhys Moethe Verch 22. Er hat 1480 in Mettingham, Suffolk, England Lady Elizabeth Treherne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. November 1512 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Newland, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Gooch è nato il il 17 maggio 1439 nel Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Knight Mathew Goch, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Treherne nel 1480, nel Mettingham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 novembre 1512, nel Newland, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Goochが1439年5月17日にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Mathew Gochは53歳，母Margred Rhys Moethe Verchは22歳であった。1480年にイギリススフォルクメッティンガムでLady Elizabeth Treherneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年11月28日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアニューランドで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Gooch(이)가 1439년 5월 17일 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight Mathew Goch(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred Rhys Moethe Verch(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 수폴크 멧틴그함에서 Lady Elizabeth Treherne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 11월 28일 영국 그루스스터실르 뉴랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.17 May 1439–28 November 1512: 17 de maio de 1439–28 de novembro de 1512
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Gooch nasceu em 17 de maio de 1439, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Mathew Goch, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Treherne em 1480, em Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1512, em Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Gooch родился 17 мая 1439 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight Mathew Goch было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Treherne в 1480 г. в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 ноября 1512 г. в местности нюланд, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.17 May 1439–28 November 1512: 17 de mayo de 1439–28 de noviembre de 1512
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Gooch nació el 17 de mayo de 1439, en Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Knight Mathew Goch, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Margred Rhys Moethe Verch, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Treherne en 1480, en Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1512, en Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
